response.overview: Brenda Romo, a strong women who grew up in the town of Jesús María, Jalisco, wants to study and become a "maestra tequilera"; those who overview the process in which Tequila is made. She'll have to face the outdated ideas of his town and an industry dominated by men who deem her less for being a woman. Through the strength and inconditional support of her mother, Brenda manages to become a successful maestra tequilera, and opens up possibilities for her younger sister; showing her there isn't just one road for her future.  Three widows is a short docummentary that follows the proffesional life and struggles of maestra tequilera, Brenda Romo.
response.title: Tres viudas
